constitutional_governance.name: Constitutional Governance
constitutional_governance.description: Enforces civilisation charter, autonomy levels, and governance scoring at every runtime boundary. Fail-closed by design.

depends_on.reason: fail-closed gate; blocks all non-compliant requests at the Express boundary
civilization-kernel loads and invokes the gate on every inbound request
constitutional charter — declarative rule source evaluated at runtime
governance scoring subsystem
autonomy level gating — degrades to conservative autonomy if absent
governance_records table — persistence for every gate decision
governance.js runtime enforcement layer

ai_reasoning.name: AI Reasoning
ai_reasoning.description: Core AI chat, cognitive processing, and LLM-backed responses via the Anthropic API.

depends_on.reason: Anthropic API — primary LLM provider; no responses without it
Claude AI model — active reasoning engine
chat-context.js — manages conversation context for every request
chat-cognitive-layer.js — cognitive enhancement; degrades gracefully
server.js — request entry point and response delivery
pg_helpers.js — database access layer for conversation memory
Supabase Postgres — conversation and memory persistence

agent_system.name: Agent System
agent_system.description: Autonomous agent tasks, scheduling, and multi-agent coordination.

depends_on.reason: agents.js — agent lifecycle management and task dispatch
task-router.js — routes incoming tasks to the correct agent
cron-scheduler.js — scheduled task execution engine
cron.js — background worker; degrades to on-demand only if absent
agent_schedules table — persistent schedule store
Supabase Postgres — agent state and result persistence
server.js — agent API endpoints

authentication.name: Authentication
authentication.description: User identity verification, session management, and access control enforcement.

depends_on.reason: app-auth.js — authentication middleware; all protected routes depend on it
session-state-registry.js — session tracking and validation
constitutional-gate.js — access control enforcement layer
sessions table — session persistence store
Supabase Postgres — underlying session and auth data store

database_persistence.name: Database Persistence
database_persistence.description: All Postgres-backed data storage — the foundational data layer. Every other capability depends on this.

depends_on.reason: Supabase Postgres — primary relational database
Supabase platform — managed infrastructure layer
pg_helpers.js — database abstraction and query helpers
pg_database.js — connection pool management

file_storage.name: File Storage
file_storage.description: Binary file upload, download, and management via Supabase Storage.

depends_on.reason: Supabase Storage — object store for all binary files
storage.js — storage API wrapper and file management
Supabase platform

notifications.name: Notifications
notifications.description: Push notification delivery and alert management.

depends_on.reason: apex_notifications table — notification queue and delivery log
Supabase Postgres — notification persistence
server.js — notification push endpoints

voice_tts.name: Voice & TTS
voice_tts.description: Text-to-speech synthesis and voice conversation processing.

depends_on.reason: tts-gemini.js — primary TTS synthesis engine
Google Gemini API — cloud TTS provider
voice-chat.js — voice conversation handler; text-only fallback exists
local Piper voice model — fallback when Gemini API is unavailable
